query: "by google" song OR movie OR book

results.title: by - Wiktionary
results.snippet: A flying insect, of the clade Anthophila within the hymenopteran superfamily Apoidea, known for its organised societies (though only a minority have them), for collecting pollen and (in some species) producing wax and honey. | A contest, especially for spelling; see spelling bee. | A community gathering to share labour, e.g. a sewing bee or a quilting bee.
